name: Pancakes
ingredients: 1 cup flour, 2 eggs, 0.5 cup milk, 2 tbsp butter
instructions: Whisk ingredients together. Cook on a hot griddle until bubbles form. Flip and cook until golden brown.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
ingredients: 200g chicken breast, 1 head romaine lettuce, 0.5 cup croutons, 3 tbsp caesar dressing
instructions: Grill chicken until cooked through and slice. Chop lettuce and toss with croutons, dressing, and chicken.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
ingredients: 200g spaghetti, 300g minced beef, 1 can chopped tomatoes, 1 onion, 2 cloves garlic
instructions: Boil pasta. Brown minced beef with chopped onion and garlic. Add tomatoes and simmer. Pour over pasta.

name: Avocado Toast
ingredients: 2 slices bread, 1 avocado, 1 egg, 1 tsp lemon juice, salt, black pepper
instructions: Toast the bread. Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Fry or boil the egg. Spread avocado on toast and top with egg.

name: Omelette
ingredients: 3 eggs, 0.25 cup milk, 0.25 cup cheese, 0.25 onion, 0.25 bell pepper, salt, black pepper
instructions: Beat eggs with milk, salt, and pepper. Cook onion and bell pepper for 2 minutes. Add eggs and cheese. Fold when set and serve warm.

name: Banana Oat Smoothie
ingredients: 1 banana, 0.5 cup oats, 1 cup milk, 1 tbsp peanut butter, 1 tsp honey
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender. Blend until smooth. Serve cold.

name: Greek Yogurt Bowl
ingredients: 1 cup Greek yogurt, 0.5 cup granola, 0.5 cup berries, 1 tbsp honey, 1 tbsp chia seeds
instructions: Add yogurt to a bowl. Top with granola, berries, honey, and chia seeds. Serve immediately.

name: French Toast
ingredients: 2 slices bread, 2 eggs, 0.25 cup milk, 1 tsp cinnamon, 1 tbsp butter, 1 tbsp syrup
instructions: Whisk eggs, milk, and cinnamon. Dip bread into mixture. Cook in butter until golden on both sides. Serve with syrup.

name: Tuna Sandwich
ingredients: 1 can tuna, 2 slices bread, 1 tbsp mayonnaise, 0.25 cucumber, 0.25 onion, lettuce, black pepper
instructions: Mix tuna with mayonnaise, onion, cucumber, and pepper. Add lettuce to bread, fill with tuna mixture, and serve.

name: Chicken Wrap
ingredients: 1 tortilla wrap, 150g chicken breast, 0.25 cup lettuce, 0.25 cup tomato, 2 tbsp garlic sauce, salt, black pepper
instructions: Season and cook chicken until done. Slice it. Add lettuce, tomato, chicken, and sauce to the wrap. Roll tightly and serve.

name: Turkey Club Sandwich
ingredients: 3 slices bread, 100g turkey slices, 2 lettuce leaves, 2 tomato slices, 2 tbsp mayonnaise, 2 slices cheese
instructions: Toast bread. Layer turkey, lettuce, tomato, cheese, and mayonnaise. Stack the sandwich and cut into halves.

name: Egg Fried Rice
ingredients: 2 cups cooked rice, 2 eggs, 0.5 cup mixed vegetables, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp oil, 1 spring onion
instructions: Scramble eggs in oil. Add vegetables and rice. Stir in soy sauce and cook until hot. Top with spring onion.

name: Chicken Noodle Soup
ingredients: 200g chicken breast, 1 cup noodles, 1 carrot, 1 celery stalk, 4 cups chicken stock, salt, black pepper
instructions: Boil chicken in stock until cooked. Shred chicken. Add carrot, celery, and noodles. Simmer until noodles are tender.

name: Beef Burger
ingredients: 200g minced beef, 1 burger bun, 1 cheese slice, lettuce, tomato, 1 tbsp burger sauce, salt, black pepper
instructions: Shape beef into a patty and season. Cook until done. Toast bun and assemble with cheese, lettuce, tomato, and sauce.

name: Chicken Alfredo Pasta
ingredients: 200g fettuccine, 200g chicken breast, 0.75 cup cream, 0.25 cup parmesan, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tbsp butter
instructions: Boil pasta. Cook chicken with garlic and butter. Add cream and parmesan. Toss with pasta until coated.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
ingredients: 1 cup broccoli, 1 bell pepper, 1 carrot, 0.5 cup mushrooms, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp oil, 1 tsp garlic
instructions: Heat oil and cook garlic. Add vegetables and stir fry until tender. Add soy sauce and cook for 2 more minutes.

name: Chicken Curry
ingredients: 300g chicken breast, 1 onion, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tbsp curry powder, 1 cup coconut milk, 1 tbsp oil, salt
instructions: Cook onion and garlic in oil. Add chicken and curry powder. Pour in coconut milk and simmer until chicken is cooked.

name: Baked Salmon
ingredients: 200g salmon fillet, 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 lemon, 1 tsp garlic, salt, black pepper, parsley
instructions: Season salmon with oil, lemon, garlic, salt, and pepper. Bake until cooked through. Garnish with parsley.

name: Shrimp Tacos
ingredients: 200g shrimp, 2 tortillas, 0.5 cup cabbage, 0.25 cup tomato, 2 tbsp sour cream, 1 lime, taco seasoning
instructions: Season and cook shrimp. Warm tortillas. Add cabbage, tomato, shrimp, sour cream, and lime juice.

name: Lentil Soup
ingredients: 1 cup red lentils, 1 onion, 1 carrot, 1 tsp cumin, 4 cups vegetable stock, 1 tbsp olive oil, salt
instructions: Cook onion and carrot in oil. Add lentils, cumin, stock, and salt. Simmer until soft, then blend if desired.

name: Margherita Pizza
ingredients: 1 pizza base, 0.5 cup tomato sauce, 1 cup mozzarella, 1 tomato, basil leaves, 1 tbsp olive oil
instructions: Spread tomato sauce on pizza base. Add mozzarella and tomato slices. Bake until cheese melts. Top with basil and olive oil.

name: Chicken Quesadilla
ingredients: 2 tortillas, 150g cooked chicken, 0.5 cup cheese, 0.25 bell pepper, 0.25 onion, 2 tbsp salsa
instructions: Fill tortilla with chicken, cheese, pepper, and onion. Cook in a pan until crispy and melted. Serve with salsa.

name: Beef Tacos
ingredients: 200g minced beef, 3 taco shells, 0.5 cup lettuce, 0.25 cup tomato, 0.25 cup cheese, taco seasoning
instructions: Cook beef with taco seasoning. Fill taco shells with beef, lettuce, tomato, and cheese. Serve warm.

name: Caprese Salad
ingredients: 2 tomatoes, 150g mozzarella, basil leaves, 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp balsamic vinegar, salt, black pepper
instructions: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella. Arrange with basil. Drizzle olive oil and balsamic vinegar. Season and serve.

name: Chickpea Salad
ingredients: 1 can chickpeas, 0.5 cucumber, 1 tomato, 0.25 onion, 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp lemon juice, parsley
instructions: Mix chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, onion, and parsley. Add olive oil and lemon juice. Toss and serve.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Toast
ingredients: 2 slices bread, 2 tbsp peanut butter, 1 banana, 1 tsp honey, 0.5 tsp cinnamon
instructions: Toast bread. Spread peanut butter. Add banana slices, honey, and cinnamon.

name: Fruit Salad
ingredients: 1 apple, 1 banana, 0.5 cup grapes, 0.5 cup strawberries, 1 tbsp orange juice, 1 tsp honey
instructions: Chop the fruits. Mix with orange juice and honey. Serve chilled.

name: Garlic Bread
ingredients: 1 baguette, 3 tbsp butter, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tbsp parsley, 0.25 cup mozzarella
instructions: Mix butter, garlic, and parsley. Spread on sliced baguette. Add mozzarella and bake until crispy.

name: Chocolate Mug Cake
ingredients: 4 tbsp flour, 2 tbsp cocoa powder, 2 tbsp sugar, 3 tbsp milk, 1 tbsp oil, 0.25 tsp baking powder
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a mug. Microwave for 1 to 2 minutes until cooked. Let it cool slightly before eating.

name: Apple Cinnamon Oats
ingredients: 0.5 cup oats, 1 cup milk, 1 apple, 1 tsp cinnamon, 1 tbsp honey, 1 tbsp nuts
instructions: Cook oats with milk. Add chopped apple and cinnamon. Top with honey and nuts.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
ingredients: 2 slices bread, 2 cheese slices, 1 tbsp butter, 0.25 tsp garlic powder
instructions: Butter the bread and add cheese between slices. Cook in a pan until golden and melted.

name: Tomato Pasta
ingredients: 200g pasta, 1 cup tomato sauce, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tbsp olive oil, 0.25 cup parmesan, basil
instructions: Boil pasta. Cook garlic in olive oil. Add tomato sauce and simmer. Toss pasta with sauce and top with parmesan.

name: Chicken Fajitas
ingredients: 250g chicken breast, 1 bell pepper, 1 onion, 2 tortillas, 1 tbsp fajita seasoning, 1 tbsp oil
instructions: Slice chicken and vegetables. Cook with oil and fajita seasoning until done. Serve in warm tortillas.

name: Rice Bowl with Chicken
ingredients: 1 cup cooked rice, 200g chicken breast, 0.5 cup cucumber, 0.5 cup carrot, 2 tbsp yogurt sauce, salt, black pepper
instructions: Season and cook chicken. Add rice to a bowl. Top with vegetables, chicken, and yogurt sauce.

name: Mushroom Risotto
ingredients: 1 cup arborio rice, 1 cup mushrooms, 0.5 onion, 3 cups chicken stock, 0.25 cup parmesan, 1 tbsp butter
instructions: Cook onion and mushrooms in butter. Add rice and stock slowly while stirring. Cook until creamy and finish with parmesan.

name: Chicken Shawarma Bowl
ingredients: 200g chicken breast, 1 cup rice, 0.5 cucumber, 0.5 tomato, 2 tbsp garlic sauce, 1 tsp shawarma spice
instructions: Season chicken with shawarma spice and cook until done. Serve over rice with cucumber, tomato, and garlic sauce.

name: Hummus Plate
ingredients: 1 cup hummus, 1 pita bread, 0.5 cucumber, 0.5 tomato, 1 tbsp olive oil, paprika
instructions: Spread hummus on a plate. Add cucumber, tomato, olive oil, and paprika. Serve with pita bread.

name: Pesto Pasta
ingredients: 200g pasta, 0.25 cup pesto, 0.25 cup parmesan, 1 tbsp olive oil, 0.5 cup cherry tomatoes
instructions: Boil pasta. Toss with pesto, olive oil, parmesan, and cherry tomatoes. Serve warm.

name: Chicken Teriyaki
ingredients: 250g chicken breast, 3 tbsp teriyaki sauce, 1 cup rice, 0.5 cup broccoli, 1 tsp sesame seeds
instructions: Cook chicken until browned. Add teriyaki sauce and simmer. Serve with rice, broccoli, and sesame seeds.

name: Berry Smoothie
ingredients: 1 cup mixed berries, 1 banana, 1 cup milk, 0.5 cup yogurt, 1 tsp honey
instructions: Blend berries, banana, milk, yogurt, and honey until smooth. Serve cold.

name: Baked Potato
ingredients: 1 large potato, 0.25 cup cheese, 2 tbsp sour cream, 1 tbsp butter, salt, black pepper, spring onion
instructions: Bake potato until soft. Cut open and add butter, cheese, sour cream, salt, pepper, and spring onion.

name: Mandi
ingredients: Rice , Water , Fish
instructions: Cook Rice . cook fish

name: Noofles
ingredients: Noodles , splices , water
instructions: Put spices and noodles in your boiling water for 3 minutes
